acrobatics.name: acrobatics
acrobatics.description: Perform acrobatic maneuvers such as flips, somersaults and tumbles.

athletics.name: athletics
athletics.description: Perform feats of running, jumping, climbing, and other physical challenges.

intimidation.name: intimidation
intimidation.description: Strike fear into others to sway the outcome of confrontations.

investigation.name: investigation
investigation.description: Find clues and uncover hidden information through careful observation.

performance.name: performance
performance.description: Entertain others with dancing, singing, jokes, acting or other performing arts.

persuasion.name: persuasion
persuasion.description: Influence others through speech and gesture.

survival.name: survival
survival.description: Forage for food and water and build makeshift shelters.

shape shifting.name: shape shifting
shape shifting.description: Magically shapeshift into animal form and fight while transformed.

air magic.name: air magic
air magic.description: Magically command the element of air

alchemy.name: alchemy
alchemy.description: Make potions and other alchemical substances

animal handling.name: animal handling
animal handling.description: Communicate with, train and give commands to animals.

blood magic.name: blood magic
blood magic.description: Magically command the element of blood.

dagger.name: dagger
dagger.description: Fight with daggers and other short blades.

dark magic.name: dark magic
dark magic.description: Wield forbidden powers drawn from shadow, decay, and malevolent forces to curse enemies, drain life, and corrupt the natural order. This dangerous magic exacts a toll on those who use it but offers devastating power.

divination magic.name: divination magic
divination magic.description: Magically foresee future events and uncover hidden information.

earth magic.name: earth magic
earth magic.description: Magically command the element of earth.

fire magic.name: fire magic
fire magic.description: Magically command the element of fire.

hunting.name: hunting
hunting.description: Track and hunt animals and people.

leadership.name: leadership
leadership.description: Lead others, in and out of combat.

divine magic.name: divine magic
divine magic.description: Channel spiritual power to smite foes with radiant energy, turn undead, ward against evil, and fortify the spirit through blessing and consecration.

lockpicking.name: lockpicking
lockpicking.description: Pick locks, using tools to open locked doors and containers without having the key.

lore.name: lore
lore.description: Theoretical knowledge of history, magic, culture, and the natural world.

medicine.name: medicine
medicine.description: Diagnose and treat injuries and diseases, as well as perform basic surgical procedures.

nature magic.name: nature magic
nature magic.description: Magically command natural growth and decay, commune with beasts, and channel the primal forces of wilderness.

necromancy magic.name: necromancy magic
necromancy magic.description: Magically communicate with and reanimate the dead, as well as summon and command undead beings.

healing magic.name: healing magic
healing magic.description: Restore living tissue, close wounds, regenerate limbs, and cure poisons through restorative magic.

riding.name: riding
riding.description: Ride horses and other mounts, in and out of combat.

enchanting magic.name: enchanting magic
enchanting magic.description: Magically enhance inanimate objects with arcane properties.

ritual magic.name: ritual magic
ritual magic.description: Cast spells that require lengthy, complex preparation and execution.

pickpocketing.name: pickpocketing
pickpocketing.description: Pick pockets and perform slight of hand through manual dexterity.

stealth.name: stealth
stealth.description: Evade detection by hiding and sneaking.

tactics.name: tactics
tactics.description: Coordinate with others in combat and identify enemies' strengths and weaknesses.

throwing.name: throwing
throwing.description: Throw small objects, in and out of combat.

water magic.name: water magic
water magic.description: Magically command the element of water.

cooking.name: cooking
cooking.description: Prepare food and cook meals from ingredients.

smithing.name: smithing
smithing.description: Forge and repair metal weapons, armor, and tools.

carpentry.name: carpentry
carpentry.description: Build and repair wooden structures, furniture, and simple wooden items.

leatherworking.name: leatherworking
leatherworking.description: Craft and repair leather armor, bags, boots, and other leather goods.

tailoring.name: tailoring
tailoring.description: Sew and repair clothing, cloth armor, and fabric goods.

psionics.name: psionics
psionics.description: Magically manipulating the mind, matter, or energy through thought alone.

blunt weapons.name: blunt weapons
blunt weapons.description: Fight with a mace, club, hammer or other bludgeoning weapon.

telepathy.name: telepathy
telepathy.description: Read surface thoughts, send mental messages, and sense emotions.

telekinesis.name: telekinesis
telekinesis.description: Move and manipulate objects through mental force alone.

engineering.name: engineering
engineering.description: Knowledge of mechanical principles, structural design, and the construction of complex devices. Encompasses everything from siege engines and fortifications to clever mechanisms, water systems, and ingenious contraptions.

shield.name: shield
shield.description: Fight defensively with shields, blocking incoming attacks and protecting allies. Can use shields to bash enemies in close combat.

lightning magic.name: lightning magic
lightning magic.description: Magically command the raw power of lightning and storms to strike foes. Wielders can focus this energy for precise shocks or unleash devastating arcs of lightning.

ice magic.name: ice magic
ice magic.description: Magically command the element of ice to freeze foes and create barriers. Wielders can conjure biting frosts or shape solid structures from thin air.

warhammer.name: warhammer
warhammer.description: Fight with heavy blunt weapons designed to crush armor and bone. This skill allows for powerful overhead strikes and defensive counters.
